ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of pollutant (e.g., Pollen, Skin cell fragments) */,
  "nurse" REAL /* Concentration of pollutant in the nurse station */,
  "hall_202" REAL /* Concentration of pollutant in hall 202 */,
  "hall_305" REAL /* Concentration of pollutant in hall 305 */,
  "cafe" REAL /* Concentration of pollutant in the cafe */,
  "outdoors" REAL /* Concentration of pollutant outdoors */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the results (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the locations table */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the sensors table */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* CO2 concentration */,
  "pm25_level" REAL /* PM2.5 concentration */,
  "pm10_level" REAL /* PM10 concentration */,
  "voc_level" REAL /* VOC concentration */,
  "aqi" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index (AQI) value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Name of the building where the location is situated */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Classroom, Office, Cafe) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the locations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Facilities Manager, Researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Facilities Manager, Researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "air_quality_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the air_quality_data table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., High Pollen, High PM2.5) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Unread, Read, Action Taken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
